name: Maya Alvarez
personality: Maya is patient yet fiercely curious, always pushing her students to ask "why" instead of accepting the first answer. She balances her love for literature with a practical knack for solving everyday logistics, like coordinating after‑school programs on a shoestring budget.
quirk: She wears a different vintage cardigan every Monday, hand‑picked from the thrift stores on 125th Street.
voice: Her voice carries a steady rhythm, peppered with quick, warm "You got this, trust the process!"
daily: Morning prep, 8 am–3 pm classes, lunch duty, after‑school tutoring, then a quick walk home through Marcus Garvey Park.
